title: Advance Tax from Provincial Sales Tax Registered Person
notes: Every provincial sales tax registered person shall pay adjustable advance tax at 3% of the turnover declared before the provincial revenue authority.
Does not apply to persons appearing in the active taxpayers' list on 30th June of the previous tax year.
reference: Section 147A

title: Advance Tax on Imports
notes: Part I of 12th Schedule: 1%.
Part II of 12th Schedule: 2% (3.5% for commercial importers).
Part III of 12th Schedule: 5.5% (6% for commercial importers).
Finished pharmaceutical products not manufactured in Pakistan: 4%.
CKD kits of electric vehicles for small cars/SUVs (50 kwh battery or below) and LCVs (150 kwh battery or below): 1%.
Mobile phones (CBU/CKD/SKD): Varies from Rs. 70 to Rs. 11,500 based on C&F value.
White Sugar (commercial import) for specified period: 0.25% (as per Second Schedule).
reference: Section 148, Part-II of First Schedule, 12th Schedule & Second Schedule

title: Tax on Salary
notes: Deducted at the average rate of tax computed at the slab rates specified in Division I of Part I of the First Schedule.
Tenth Schedule (100% increase for non-ATL) does not apply to regular salary.
reference: Section 149(1), Div I, Part I of First Schedule

title: Tax on Pension
notes: Any person responsible for paying pension to a former employee (below age 70) deriving pension exceeding Rs. 10 million in a tax year, shall deduct tax at 5% on the amount over and above Rs. 10 million.
reference: Section 149(1A), Div I, Part I of First Schedule

title: Directorship Fee or Board Meeting Fee
notes: Tax deducted on gross amount payable for attending board meetings or directorship fee.
reference: Section 149(3)

title: Tax on Dividends
notes: Independent Power Producers (pass-through items): 7.5%.
Mutual funds deriving 50%+ income from profit on debt: 25%.
Other standard cases (including normal mutual funds and REITs): 15%.
Dividend received by REIT Scheme from Special Purpose Vehicle (SPV): 0%.
Dividend received by others from SPV (under REIT regulations): 35%.
Dividend from a company where no tax is payable due to exemption/loss offset/tax credits: 25%.
Second Schedule exemptions for inter-corporate dividends within group companies (Sec 59AA) applies.
reference: Section 150, Div I, Part III of First Schedule

title: Yield or Profit on Debt
notes: Yield paid by banking company or financial institution: 20%.
Govt securities paid to any person other than an individual: 20%.
Other cases: 15%.
Second Schedule (Clause 5AB): 10% for non-resident individual holding POC/NICOP/CNIC investing through Foreign Currency Value Account (FCVA).
reference: Section 151, Div IA, Part III of First Schedule

title: Gain on Disposal of Debt Securities
notes: Deducted by custodian of debt securities (including IPS account) on the gross amount of capital gain.
Does not apply on disposal through registered stock exchange settled through NCCPL.
reference: Section 151A, Div IIIAA, Part III of First Schedule

title: Royalty, Tech Services, General Payments
notes: Royalty / Fee for technical services: 15%.
Fee for offshore digital services: 10%.
Execution of construction/assembly contracts (152(1A)): 7%.
Insurance/re-insurance premium (152(1AA)): 5%.
Advertisement services to non-resident media (152(1AAA)): 10%.
Foreign produced commercial (152(1BA)): 20%.
Capital gain on debt instruments/Govt securities via SCRA/FCVA (152(1D/1DA)): 10%.
Payment to global money transfer operators/card networks/payment gateways (152(1DC/1DD)): 10%.
General payments to non-residents (152(2)): 20%.
reference: Section 152, Div II, Part III of First Schedule

title: Payments to Permanent Establishment (PE) of Non-Resident
notes: Sale of goods by Company: 5%.
Sale of goods by Others: 5.5%.
Services (Transport, hotel, IT services, courier, security, software, engineering, telecom, car rental, etc.): 4%.
Other services (Company): 9%.
Other services (Others): 11%.
Contracts (Sportspersons): 15%.
Contracts (Company): 6.5%.
reference: Section 152(2A)

title: Payment for Sale of Goods
notes: Rice, cotton seed, edible oils: 1.5%.
Toll manufacturing: 9% (Company), 11% (Others).
Other goods: 5% (Company), 5.5% (Others).
FMCG, fertilizer, electronics, sugar, cement, steel, edible oil distributors/dealers/wholesalers/retailers (Second Sched 24C): 0.25% if on ATL.
Cigarette distributors (Second Sched 24A): 2.5%.
Pharma distributors (Second Sched 24A): 1%.
Gold and silver and articles thereof (Second Sched 31): 1%.
reference: Section 153(1)(a), Div III, Part III of First Schedule & Second Schedule

title: Payment for Services
notes: Transport, freight, courier, manpower, hotel, security, tracking, advertising (non-media), car rental, building maintenance, PMEX/PSX services: 6%.
IT services & IT enabled services: 4%.
Electronic/print media advertising: 1.5%.
Other services: 9% (Company), 11% (Others).
Oil tanker contractors (Second Sched 43D): 2.5%.
Goods transport contractors (Second Sched 43E): 3.5%.
National Logistics Corp (Second Sched 24CB): 3%.
reference: Section 153(1)(b), Div III, Part III of First Schedule & Second Schedule

title: Execution of Contracts
notes: Sportspersons: 15%.
Company: 6.5%.
Others: 8%.
reference: Section 153(1)(c), Div III, Part III of First Schedule

title: Payments by Exporters / Export Houses
notes: Services of stitching, dying, printing, embroidery, washing, sizing, weaving to an exporter/export house.
Rate is 1%.
reference: Section 153(2), Div IV, Part III of First Schedule

title: Digital Transactions in E-commerce
notes: Payment intermediary for digital means or banking channels: 1%.
Courier service for Cash on Delivery (CoD): 2%.
reference: Section 153(2A), Div III, Part III of First Schedule

title: Export of Goods
notes: Proceeds of export of goods: 1%.
Tenth Schedule does not apply to 154.
reference: Section 154, Div IV, Part III of First Schedule

title: Export of Services
notes: IT services/software (registered with PSEB): 0.25% (for tax years 2024 up to 2026).
Other services/contracts outside Pakistan: 1%.
Tenth Schedule does not apply to 154A.
reference: Section 154A, Div IVA, Part III of First Schedule

title: Rent of Immovable Property
notes: Company: 15%.
Individuals/AOPs: 0% up to Rs 300,000; Slab rates apply above Rs 300,000 ranging from 5% to 25% plus fixed amounts.
reference: Section 155, Div V, Part III of First Schedule

title: Prizes and Winnings
notes: Prize bonds or crossword puzzle: 15%.
Raffle, lottery, quiz, promotional prizes: 20%.
reference: Section 156, Div VI, Part III of First Schedule

title: Sale of Petroleum Products
notes: Collected on the amount of commission or discount allowed to petrol pump operators: 12%.
reference: Section 156A, Div VIA, Part III of First Schedule

title: Advance Tax on Cash Withdrawal
notes: Applicable only to persons NOT appearing in the active taxpayers' list on aggregate daily withdrawals exceeding Rs. 50,000.
Rate is 0.8% of the cash withdrawal.
reference: Section 231AB

title: Purchase, Registration and Transfer of Motor Vehicles
notes: Purchase/Registration/Transfer: Varies by engine capacity (0.5% to 12% of value for >1000cc). Fixed amounts for lower CCs.
Lease to non-ATL: 4% of the value of the motor vehicle.
Non-ATL rate is increased by 200% (i.e., effectively 3 times the ATL rate).
reference: Section 231B, Div VII, Part IV of First Schedule & Tenth Schedule

title: Advance tax on foreign domestic workers
notes: Collected by authority issuing/renewing domestic aide visa to foreign national.
reference: Section 231C

title: Brokerage and Commission
notes: Advertising Agents: 10%.
Life Insurance Agents (<0.5m/annum): 8%.
Persons not covered above: 12%.
National Logistics Corp toll lease: 3% (Second Schedule 24CB).
reference: Section 233, Div II, Part IV of First Schedule & Second Schedule

title: Tax on Motor Vehicles (Annual)
notes: Goods transport: Rs 2.5 per kg.
Passenger transport: Rs 200 - 1500 per seat based on capacity and AC/Non-AC.
Private vehicles: Fixed rates varying by CC (Rs 800 to Rs 10,000 annually or Rs 10,000 to Rs 120,000 lump sum).
reference: Section 234, Div III, Part IV of First Schedule

title: Electricity Consumption
notes: Commercial: 10% up to 20k, Rs 1950 + 12% above 20k.
Industrial: 10% up to 20k, Rs 1950 + 5% above 20k.
Domestic: 0% below 25k, 7.5% for 25k or more (does not apply if on ATL).
reference: Section 235, Div IV, Part IV of First Schedule

title: Telephone and Internet Users
notes: Telephone (Landline > Rs 1000): 10%.
Mobile/Internet prepaid cards or bill: 15%.
reference: Section 236, Div V, Part IV of First Schedule

title: Advance tax at the time of sale by auction
notes: General auction: 10%.
Immovable property & train management services auction by Pak Railways: 5%.
National Logistics Corp toll lease: 3% (Second Schedule 24CB).
reference: Section 236A, Div VIII, Part IV of First Schedule & Second Schedule

title: Advance Tax on Sale/Transfer of Immovable Property
notes: Up to Rs 50m: 4.5%.
Rs 50m to Rs 100m: 5%.
Above Rs 100m: 5.5%.
Tenth Schedule Specific Non-ATL fixed rate: 11.5%.
Tenth Schedule Late Filer specific rates: Up to Rs 50m: 7.5%, Rs 50m-100m: 8.5%, Above 100m: 9.5%.
reference: Section 236C, Div X, Part IV of First Sched & Tenth Schedule

title: Advance Tax on TV Plays and Advertisements
notes: Foreign drama serial: Rs 1,000,000 per episode.
Foreign single play: Rs 3,000,000.
Ad starring foreign actor: Rs 100,000 per second.
reference: Section 236CA, Div XA, Part IV of First Schedule

title: Advance Tax on Functions and Gatherings
notes: Collected from person arranging functions in marriage halls, hotels, marquees, clubs, etc..
Rate is 10% on the total amount of the bill.
reference: Section 236CB, Div XI, Part IV of First Schedule

title: Advance tax on sales to distributors, dealers or wholesalers
notes: Fertilizer: 0.7% (0.25% if on ATL of ST & IT).
Other items: 0.1%.
Fixed at 2% for non-ATL for other than fertilizer (as per Tenth Sched).
reference: Section 236G, Div XIV, Part IV of First Sched & Tenth Schedule

title: Advance tax on sales to retailers
notes: All covered sectors: 0.5%.
Fixed at 2.5% for non-ATL (as per Tenth Sched).
reference: Section 236H, Div XV, Part IV of First Sched & Tenth Schedule

title: Advance Tax on Purchase or Transfer of Immovable Property
notes: Up to Rs 50m: 3%.
Above Rs 100m: 4%.
Tenth Schedule Specific Non-ATL rates: Up to Rs 50m: 10.5%, Rs 50m-100m: 14.5%, Above Rs 100m: 18.5%.
Tenth Schedule Late Filer rates: Up to Rs 50m: 4.5%, Rs 50m-100m: 5.5%, Above 100m: 6.5%.
reference: Section 236K, Div XVIII, Part IV of First Sched & Tenth Schedule

title: Advance tax on persons remitting amounts abroad through credit or debit or prepaid cards
notes: Collected at the time of transfer of any sum remitted outside Pakistan via cards.
Rate is 5%.
reference: Section 236Y, Div XXVII, Part IV of First Schedule

title: Bonus shares issued by companies
notes: Company to withhold 10% of bonus shares and collect tax equal to 10% of their value.
reference: Section 236Z
